sections.title: Autopilot Automations Registry
sections.content: This document is the single source of truth for all Vitana Autopilot automations. Every automation has a permanent ID (AP-XXXX) that never changes, even if the automation is rewritten, moved, or deprecated. This registry is designed for continuous development over multiple years.
sections.content_markdown: This document is the single source of truth for all Vitana Autopilot automations. Every automation has a permanent ID (AP-XXXX) that never changes, even if the automation is rewritten, moved, or deprecated. This registry is designed for continuous development over multiple years.

sections.title: ID Scheme
sections.content:
Format: AP-XXXX

Ranges:
- AP-0100 to AP-0199: Connect People (matchmaking, introductions, icebreakers)
- AP-0200 to AP-0299: Community & Groups (groups, invites, meetups)
- AP-0300 to AP-0399: Events & Live Rooms (scheduling, reminders, follow-ups)
- AP-0400 to AP-0499: Sharing & Growth (WhatsApp, social media, referrals, viral loops)
- AP-0500 to AP-0599: Engagement Loops (briefings, re-engagement, milestones)
- AP-0600 to AP-0699: Health & Wellness (reports, PHI, consent, local LLM)
- AP-0700 to AP-0799: Payments & Subscriptions (Stripe, retries, upgrades)
- AP-0800 to AP-0899: Personalization Engines (D28-D51 integrations)
- AP-0900 to AP-0999: Memory & Intelligence (facts, retrieval, knowledge graph)
- AP-1000 to AP-1099: Platform Operations (VTID lifecycle, governance, deploy)
- AP-1100+: Reserved for future domains

Statuses:
- PLANNED: Defined but not implemented
- IN_PROGRESS: Currently being built
- IMPLEMENTED: Code exists, not yet deployed
- LIVE: Running in production
- DEPRECATED: Superseded or removed
sections.content_markdown:
**Format:** `AP-XXXX`

**Ranges:**
| Range | Domain |
|-------|--------|
| AP-0100 – AP-0199 | Connect People (matchmaking, introductions, icebreakers) |
| AP-0200 – AP-0299 | Community & Groups (groups, invites, meetups) |
| AP-0300 – AP-0399 | Events & Live Rooms (scheduling, reminders, follow-ups) |
| AP-0400 – AP-0499 | Sharing & Growth (WhatsApp, social media, referrals, viral loops) |
| AP-0500 – AP-0599 | Engagement Loops (briefings, re-engagement, milestones) |
| AP-0600 – AP-0699 | Health & Wellness (reports, PHI, consent, local LLM) |
| AP-0700 – AP-0799 | Payments & Subscriptions (Stripe, retries, upgrades) |
| AP-0800 – AP-0899 | Personalization Engines (D28–D51 integrations) |
| AP-0900 – AP-0999 | Memory & Intelligence (facts, retrieval, knowledge graph) |
| AP-1000 – AP-1099 | Platform Operations (VTID lifecycle, governance, deploy) |
| AP-1100+ | Reserved for future domains |

**Statuses:** `PLANNED` → `IN_PROGRESS` → `IMPLEMENTED` → `LIVE` → `DEPRECATED`
